Description: Provide a single local command that runs the full Epic 1 flow end to end.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add a command-line entrypoint callable with uv run and a selected root folder.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The project exposes a CLI entrypoint that accepts the trip root path.

Stories.StoryDescription: Connect inventory, day assignment, quality checks, and file actions into one pipeline function.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: A single pipeline function runs the Epic 1 workflow end to end.

Stories.StoryDescription: Emit structured log messages that summarize how many files were accepted, rejected, or treated as artifacts.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The pipeline logs a run summary with useful counts for operators.

Stories.StoryDescription: Return and print a concise run summary for local use from VS Code or uv run.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The entrypoint prints a clear report of the processing result.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add an integration-style test covering a full run and a safe rerun on the same folder.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Automated tests cover a full end-to-end run and rerun behavior.
